flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Michigan-Flint rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Michigan-Flint rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.0k → $28.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Michigan-Flint fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Michigan-Flint rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 (11.1% → 13.6%).
